_comment: Source of truth for skill rankings. Read/write by scripts and LLMs.

_schema.meta: {last_updated: ISO8601, total_skills: int, total_scenarios: int, version: str}
_schema.repo_signals: {stars: int, forks: int, open_issues: int, contributors: int, discussions: int}
_schema.scoring.weights: {depth: str, community: str, documentation: str, repo_health: str}
_schema.leaderboard: [{rank: int, name: str, score: float, tier: str, phase: str}] — ordered best first
_schema.scenarios.<phase_id>: {label: str, scenarios: {scenario_id: {trigger: str, problem: str, skills: [str]}}}
_schema.skills.<name>: {score: float, tier: str, phase: str, all_phases: [str], description: str, signals: {depth, mentions, mention_score, desc_quality, repo_bonus, category_weight, raw_score}}
_schema.user_overrides.<name>: {score: float?, tier: str?} — manual overrides preserved across re-ranks

is-this-worth-building.trigger: I have an idea but don't know if anyone would pay for it
is-this-worth-building.problem: Unvalidated idea, risk of building something nobody wants

who-is-my-customer.trigger: I don't know who my target customer is or how to describe my product
who-is-my-customer.problem: Unclear positioning, ICP, or value proposition

am-i-thinking-big-enough.trigger: I have a plan but I'm not sure if the scope is right
am-i-thinking-big-enough.problem: Scope uncertainty — too ambitious or not ambitious enough

who-are-my-competitors.trigger: I need to understand the competitive landscape
who-are-my-competitors.problem: Don't know how competitors position or what alternatives exist

plan-before-coding.trigger: I have requirements but need to plan the implementation
plan-before-coding.problem: Complex task that needs breaking down before writing code

build-the-ui.trigger: I need to build a frontend that looks professional
build-the-ui.problem: Need production-grade UI, not generic AI-looking output

review-architecture.trigger: I want someone to check my architecture before I build
review-architecture.problem: Risk of structural issues, wrong patterns, or missed edge cases

something-is-broken.trigger: I have a bug and I don't know why
something-is-broken.problem: Unexpected behavior, test failures, or errors

write-tests-first.trigger: I want to implement a feature with proper test coverage
write-tests-first.problem: Need confidence that new code works and doesn't break existing code

parallelize-work.trigger: I have multiple independent tasks to do at once
parallelize-work.problem: Sequential work is too slow, tasks don't depend on each other

handle-code-review.trigger: I got code review feedback and I'm not sure I agree with all of it
handle-code-review.problem: Need to evaluate feedback critically, not just accept blindly

isolate-feature-work.trigger: I want to work on a feature without affecting the main branch
isolate-feature-work.problem: Need isolation for risky or long-running changes

create-custom-skill.trigger: I want to create a reusable skill for my own workflow
create-custom-skill.problem: Repetitive workflow that should be automated as a skill

get-second-opinion.trigger: I want another AI to review or challenge my code
get-second-opinion.problem: Need an independent perspective on code quality

ready-to-ship.trigger: My code is ready, I want to create a PR and ship it
ready-to-ship.problem: Need full ship workflow: tests, review, version bump, PR

review-before-merge.trigger: I want to review the diff before landing this PR
review-before-merge.problem: Need to catch security issues, side effects, or structural problems

deploy-to-production.trigger: PR is approved, I want to merge and verify production
deploy-to-production.problem: Need to merge, wait for CI, and confirm production health

test-the-app.trigger: I need to QA test my app and fix bugs
test-the-app.problem: Don't know if the app works correctly end-to-end

test-authenticated-pages.trigger: I need to test pages that require login
test-authenticated-pages.problem: Headless browser doesn't have my session/cookies

check-visual-quality.trigger: The app works but the design looks off
check-visual-quality.problem: Spacing, alignment, hierarchy, or consistency issues

check-performance.trigger: I want to make sure my changes didn't slow things down

monitor-after-deploy.trigger: I just deployed, I want to watch for errors
monitor-after-deploy.problem: Need to catch post-deploy regressions quickly

update-docs-after-shipping.trigger: I shipped a feature, now docs are outdated
update-docs-after-shipping.problem: README, CHANGELOG, and other docs don't match what shipped

weekly-team-review.trigger: What did we ship this week? What went well?

working-on-production.trigger: I'm touching production systems and don't want to break anything
working-on-production.problem: Risk of destructive commands or accidental changes

security-audit.trigger: I want to check my app for vulnerabilities before launch
security-audit.problem: Need to find real security issues, not just theoretical ones

not-ranking-in-google.trigger: My site isn't showing up in Google search results
not-ranking-in-google.problem: Technical SEO issues, missing meta tags, or poor content

not-showing-in-ai-search.trigger: I want ChatGPT and Perplexity to mention my product
not-showing-in-ai-search.problem: Content isn't structured for AI citation or extraction

no-rich-results.trigger: My search results don't show stars, FAQs, or other rich data

need-lots-of-seo-pages.trigger: I want to rank for hundreds of keywords at scale
need-lots-of-seo-pages.problem: Can't manually create pages for every keyword variation

planning-site-structure.trigger: I'm building a new site and need to plan the page hierarchy
planning-site-structure.problem: Unclear navigation, URL structure, or internal linking

dont-know-what-to-write.trigger: I need a content strategy but I don't know where to start
dont-know-what-to-write.problem: No plan for what topics to cover or in what order

need-page-copy.trigger: I need to write compelling copy for my website
need-page-copy.problem: Blank page, weak headlines, unclear value proposition

need-social-media-content.trigger: I need posts for LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram
need-social-media-content.problem: Don't know what to post or how to repurpose content

stuck-on-marketing.trigger: I don't know how to market my product

launching-a-product.trigger: I'm about to launch and need a plan
launching-a-product.problem: No launch strategy, don't know how to maximize impact

need-lead-magnets.trigger: I want to capture emails with free content or tools
need-lead-magnets.problem: No lead magnets, gated content, or free tools

run-paid-ads.trigger: I want to run Google or Facebook ads
run-paid-ads.problem: No ad strategy, targeting, or budget plan

cold-outbound.trigger: I want to reach out to potential customers directly
cold-outbound.problem: Cold emails that don't get replies

nurture-leads.trigger: I have leads but they're not converting to customers
nurture-leads.problem: No email sequences to warm up and nurture leads

get-referrals.trigger: I want existing customers to bring me new ones
get-referrals.problem: No referral program or viral loop

enable-sales-team.trigger: My sales team needs better materials
enable-sales-team.problem: No pitch decks, one-pagers, or objection handling docs

leads-not-reaching-sales.trigger: Marketing generates leads but sales doesn't follow up
leads-not-reaching-sales.problem: No lead scoring, routing, or handoff process

win-comparison-shoppers.trigger: Prospects are comparing us to competitors
win-comparison-shoppers.problem: No comparison pages or competitive positioning

landing-page-not-converting.trigger: People visit my page but don't sign up or buy
landing-page-not-converting.problem: Low conversion rate on landing/pricing/feature pages

signup-dropoff.trigger: People start signing up but don't finish
signup-dropoff.problem: Friction in registration flow, too many steps or fields

forms-not-working.trigger: My lead capture or contact form has low completion
forms-not-working.problem: Too many fields, confusing layout, or unclear value

free-users-wont-pay.trigger: Free users aren't upgrading to paid
free-users-wont-pay.problem: Weak upgrade prompts, unclear value of paid tier

what-should-i-charge.trigger: I don't know how to price my product
what-should-i-charge.problem: Unclear pricing model, tiers, or willingness to pay

need-to-test-changes.trigger: I changed something and want to know if it actually helped
need-to-test-changes.problem: No A/B test framework or statistical rigor

dont-know-whats-happening.trigger: I can't tell what users are doing on my site
dont-know-whats-happening.problem: No analytics, event tracking, or conversion measurement

users-sign-up-but-dont-stick.trigger: People create accounts but never come back
users-sign-up-but-dont-stick.problem: No onboarding flow, users don't reach the aha moment

customers-canceling.problem: No save offers, exit surveys, or win-back flows

users-going-inactive.trigger: Active users are becoming inactive over time
users-going-inactive.problem: No re-engagement emails or lifecycle communication

pricing-not-working.trigger: Revenue isn't growing even though users are growing
pricing-not-working.problem: Wrong pricing, packaging, or value metric

generate-prompts.trigger: I need a production-ready prompt for a specific role or task
generate-prompts.problem: Writing good prompts from scratch is slow and inconsistent

create-agents.trigger: I want to build a custom AI agent for my workflow
create-agents.problem: Need structured agent with proper tools and MCP integration

create-commands.trigger: I want a custom slash command for a repeated workflow
create-commands.problem: Doing the same multi-step task manually every time

create-hooks.trigger: I want Claude Code to automatically do something on events
create-hooks.problem: Need automated behaviors tied to tool calls or file changes

manage-skill-collection.trigger: I want to install, update, or remove skills
manage-skill-collection.problem: Need to manage the amazing_cc_skills collection

work-with-documents.trigger: I need to create, read, or edit PDF/Word/PowerPoint/Excel files
work-with-documents.problem: Need to process office documents programmatically

research-with-sources.trigger: I need source-grounded answers or real-time search
research-with-sources.problem: Need citations from documents or live web/academic data

scope-edits-safely.trigger: I want to restrict edits to one folder while debugging
scope-edits-safely.problem: Risk of accidentally changing unrelated code

visualize-data-or-architecture.trigger: I need a diagram, chart, or dashboard I can share with others
visualize-data-or-architecture.problem: Need a shareable link to a visualization — not a local file

read-or-send-imessage.trigger: I want to read my iMessage history or send a text message
read-or-send-imessage.problem: Need to search, read, or send messages via Apple Messages (DANGEROUS: reads local DB, debugging only)
